### Checklist

*Feel free to open the PR even if you haven't checked all of these yet! We're happy to help you get it over the finish line.*

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/stpaine/FERS/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document.
- [ ] My code generally follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable).
